series_metadata.series_description: These files contain applications and related correspondence and documentation for investment adviser licensure, renewal applications, updates, notices of termination and other materials related to investment adviser licensing and notice filing.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Maintain securities machine readable records on database for 5 years from the date of termination, then destroy by erasure. ; Paper: Retain in operating area for a period of 5 years from the date of termination or scanned and verified then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
